quality_scenarios.assertion: Default path does not require DEEPSEEK_API_KEY or call DeepSeek-bound pipeline.py/batch.py extraction.
Agent JSON must validate routes and reagents before writing CSV files.
Completion report lists input, stages, outputs, counts, completion state, failed/skipped stages, and safety/pricing caveats.
At least one real DOI/PDF/text sample produces needs_agent_extraction, complete, degraded_complete, or evidence_boundary with output inventory.
Skill docs, evals, and reports do not contain secrets, OAuth/login traces, or unredacted private server paths.
CNKI DOI inputs that resolve to non-MOF materials stop at evidence_boundary with metadata-only outputs and no inferred reagent/price rows.
Chinese JSON/Markdown validation uses explicit UTF-8 and user-facing CSVs are UTF-8-SIG.
Gated publisher/CNKI runs record coarse timing and avoid repeated unbounded dynamic search attempts after metadata-only evidence is established.
